//: Editor-UX config only. The authoritative gates are tsconfig.node.json (`npm run typecheck:node`) and tsconfig.web.json (`npm run typecheck:web`) — this file exists so an editor opening any file in the repo gets sane strictness + path aliases. It is intentionally NOT a composite/solution root, because package.json runs `tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json` and composite+noEmit conflict.
